title: Sanctuary
overview: Souichiro Nagi and his best friend Bob Makihara (a.k.a the Knuckle Bombs) arrive to their new school of Todo Academy with plan of ruling the school by defeating anybody that get in their way just as they have done at their previous schools. They soon learn first that Todo Academy is no ordinary school.

title: Defeat
overview: Souichiro tries to deal with his lose in fight and to the fact that their are stronger fighters at Todo then himself. The Knuckle Bombs antics catch the attention of Tsutomu Ryuuzaki of the Executive Council that keep the order in the school and punish the students that do not follow the rules.

title: Executioner
overview: The Knuckle Bombs race to protect Bob's girlfriend Chiaki Kounoike from Tsutomu at the laundromat. After being defeated, they join the Juken Club and Maya Natsume retaliates for her new members.

title: Suspicion
overview: The Juken Club trains during Golden week break, while Tsutomu gets punished for not fulfilling Executive Council orders by another enforcer named Kōji Sagara.

title: Punishment
overview: The Juken Club goes bowling and gets ambushed by the Executive Council.

title: Illusion
overview: The fight between the Juken Club and the Executive Council continues and Mitsuomi Takayanagi, the president of the Executive Council, arrives on the scene.

title: Breakthrough
overview: Souichiro finishes his fight with the enforcer Sagara while Masataka Takayanagi fights his brother Mitsuomi.

title: Dragon’s  Eye
overview: Mitsuomi confronts Bob and Souichiro and the enforcer Shirō Tagami nearly dies when Aya Natsume's Dragon's Eye activate.

title: Enforcement
overview: The battle between Souichiro and Mitsuomi comes to a conclusion.

title: Memory
overview: Maya reveals the past between her, Mitsuomi, her brother Shin, and his girlfriend Mana Kuzunoha.

title: One With an Unusual Talent
overview: Mana Kuzunoha reveals Shin Natsume's insanity to Mitsuomi.

title: Darkness
overview: Shin is called to a meeting with Dōgen Takayanagi. Bunshichi Tawara has problems trying to find his friend Shin.

title: Magical Power
overview: Mitsuomi struggles with a paralyzing fear. Bunshichi finds Shin at the meeting and they begin to fight.

title: Hellfire
overview: The fight between Bunshichi and Shin reaches its conclusion.

title: Yin and Yang
overview: Mitsuomi overcomes his paralyzing fear. Later, Mitsuomi and Shin race on motorcycles as a farewell party to Team KATANA.

title: Conclusion
overview: Maya finishes her story and the Juken Club return to school. Souichiro and Bob fight Kanakita Ryuusen, while Maya meets with the school principal.

title: True Motive
overview: Maya's expulsion from school, Souichiro and Bob attack the Enforcer's club office.

title: Sympathy
overview: Souichiro and Bob try to find out more of the past from Bunshichi, while Maya and Mitsuomi team up to search for Aya, who has the cursed sword Reiki.

title: Start Up
overview: Bunshichi reveals more of the past, starting with how Shin Natsume formed the Juken Club and how Mitsuomi persuaded Maya to join the club.

title: Stratagem
overview: The preliminary matches of the tournament get underway, but Master Dougen pays Shin a visit asking him a favor...

title: Accidental Discharge
overview: Fu Cheun / Fu Chein took Maya captive in order to force Shin to comply with Master Dougen's demands, but Shin's Dragon Eye activates and the two fight. Kuzunoha runs off to find Mitsuomi to help stop the berserk Shin.

title: Determination
overview: The Finals to the Tournament come and the Jyuken Club must fight the Anti-Jyuken Special Team made from 5 of the 10 strongest fighters in Toudou. Mitsuomi shows up to help Tawara and Kuzuo, but instead takes out everyone by himself in about 3 minutes. He then learns from Kuzunoha what the consequences of his fight with Shin really are.

title: Curse
overview: 2 months have passed and Mitsuomi fights Shin for the presidency of the Enforcers.

title: Vicissitudes
overview: Maya and Mitsuomi try to retrieve Chokutou Reki form Aya but are stopped when Souichiro fights Mitsuomi.
